markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover to Carrie, review performance, and address content quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Leadership Transition:** Vivek is leaving GrowthX; Carrie Chowske is the new account lead, with a full handover planned to ensure a seamless transition.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Recent blogs have critical errors (dead links, missing internal links, outdated messaging). This requires an immediate production process review to restore quality.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**SEO Performance:** Galileo's top-10 keyword gap with competitor Arise has widened from \~25% to 48% (Arise: 986 vs. Galileo: 501 keywords). A strategic shift to focus on regaining this ground is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX is launching an internal AI visibility tool to replace Scrunch. It backloads 90 days of data and focuses on high-intent "evaluation stage" prompts, providing immediate, higher-value insights.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Strategy

  - [**January Performance:** Sluggish start; expected to slightly exceed December's results.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Evals cohort performed well.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Observability cohort saw a slight dip.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Existing competitor pages received a boost.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Keyword Gap:** The gap with competitor Arise has widened significantly.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Galileo:** 501 top-10 keywords (up from 448).](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Arise:** 986 top-10 keywords (up from 880).](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** A sprint to regain SEO ground is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The widening gap is a major concern.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Focus:** Prioritize SEO-driven content (e.g., listicles, FAQs) over other topics.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX has already created listicle topics to fill identified gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### Content Quality Issues

  - [**Problem:** Recent blogs have critical errors and inconsistencies.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Specific Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Dead links.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Missing internal links to Galileo.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Poor anchor text placement.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Outdated product messaging and docs.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Inconsistent CTAs focused only on "guardrails," ignoring the full platform (observability, evals).](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**Action:** Galileo will provide detailed feedback via comments in the review queue.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

### Competitor Landing Pages

  - [**Blocker:** The original Framer design is not replicable in the CMS, requiring bespoke development for each page.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**New Plan:** Simplify the design to a pillar-page style.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [**Proposed Features:** A different header and a sticky "Book a Demo" CTA in the table of contents.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Action:** Galileo will resend the existing wireframe for feedback to unblock the design process.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### New AI Visibility Tool

  - [**Context:** GrowthX is transitioning from Scrunch to an internal tool for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [**Immediate Data:** Backloads 90 days of historical data, providing instant insights.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [**High-Intent Focus:** Library of pre-loaded prompts targets "evaluation stage" searches.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Clearer UI:** Shows full AI-generated answers, brand mentions, and direct citations.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Custom Prompts:** Allows for private, Galileo-specific prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Client access is targeted for the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Galileo:**](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [Resend the existing competitor landing page wireframe for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [Send the "State of Eval Engineering" report PDF to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [Provide detailed feedback on recent blogs in the review queue.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Investigate the root cause of recent content quality issues and report back.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [Prioritize SEO-focused content (listicles, FAQs) to close the keyword gap.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Grant Galileo access to the new AI visibility tool by the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/DdawBYfyfRSTXqX_K7BWxsDzm9ecDW66?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
